title: Cisco Nonprofit Program through TechSoup
description: Cisco Nonprofit Program through TechSoup provides eligible nonprofit or social-impact organizations with software donations, nonprofit discounts, communications tools, productivity tools, security tools under its current published program terms.
eligibility: Organizations must satisfy the provider's current nonprofit-status verification, acceptable-use, product, and regional requirements.
value: Donated and discounted Cisco networking, collaboration, and security products for eligible nonprofits.
